mapper.sql:
n.id ,u.username ,kakao_user_id, AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(u.phone_number), 'tb_mbm_user') phoneNumber ,p.user_id ,n.point_id ,n.npay_api_type ,GET_CODE_NAME('npay_api_type', n.npay_api_type) AS npayApiTypeName ,n.req_amount ,n.user_key ,n.partner_tx_no ,n.tx_no ,n.memo ,n.daou_code ,n.daou_message ,n.create_date ,n.create_id
,n.modified_date ,n.modified_id ,n.modified_date AS mngDate ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(n.modified_id) AS mngName
,CASE WHEN DATE_ADD(n.create_date, INTERVAL 3 DAY) <= NOW() THEN 'OUTTER' ELSE 'INNER' END AS dayAfter

where.if: AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.kakao_user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM tb_mbm_user u LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_point p ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_point_npay n ON p.id = n.point_id

SELECT
FROM tb_mbm_user u LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_point p ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_point_npay n ON p.id = n.point_id WHERE n.id = #{searchNpayId}
SELECT count(1) FROM tb_mbm_user u LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_point p ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_point_npay n ON p.id = n.point_id WHERE n.partner_tx_no = #{searchPartnerTxNo}
